_note: The Julio-Claudian emperors — a REAL branch off Mark Antony (already in the tree). Antony's marriage to Octavia (Augustus's sister) produced Antonia Minor, ancestress of the Julio-Claudians. Documented history. Ordered create-before-reference.

families.note: Mark Antony's OTHER marriage — to Octavia, sister of Augustus.
